zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency於大約1090年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"18歲，母親Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"18歲。他於1126年與'Alice' FitzRoy在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1138年被列為constable of france (under louis vii)。他去世於1160年10月28日在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency于大约1090年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"18岁，母亲Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"18岁。他于1126年与'Alice' FitzRoy在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特莫倫希结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他于1138年被列为constable of france (under louis vii)。他去世于1160年10月28日在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency was born about 1090, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, his father, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", was 18 and his mother, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", was 18. He married 'Alice' FitzRoy in 1126, in Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. In 1138, his occupation is listed as constable of france (under louis vii). He died on 28 October 1160, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency est né environ 1090, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", avait 18 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", avait 18 ans. Il a épousé 'Alice' FitzRoy en 1126, à Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. En 1138, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of france (under louis vii). Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1160, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency um 1090 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" 18 und seine Mutter Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine" 18. Er hat 1126 in Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich 'Alice' FitzRoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. 1138 ist sein Beruf als constable of france (under louis vii) aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1160 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency è nato il circa 1090 nel Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato 'Alice' FitzRoy nel 1126, nel Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Nel 1138, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of france (under louis vii). Morì il 28 ottobre 1160, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorencyが約1090年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"は18歳，母Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"は18歳であった。1126年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントモーエンシで'Alice' FitzRoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。1138年，職業はconstable of france (under louis vii)と記録されている。彼は1160年10月28日に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency"(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine"(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1126년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽모렌시에서 'Alice' FitzRoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 1138년, 그의 직업은 constable of france (under louis vii)이었다. 그는 1160년 10월 28일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com 'Alice' FitzRoy em 1126, em Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Em 1138, sua profissão aparece como constable of france (under louis vii). Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1160, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency родился около 1090 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency" было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", 18. Он женился на женщине по имени 'Alice' FitzRoy в 1126 г. в местности монтморенси, сине-ет-оис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1138 году он работал по профессии constable of france (under louis vii). Он умер 28 октября 1160 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

sm.1138-1160: mai le 1138 e o'o I le 1160

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathieu de Montmorency I  Seigneur de Montmorency nació aproximadamente 1090, en Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Bouchard IV de Montmorency "Seigneur de Montmorency", tenía 18 años y su mamá, Agnes de Beaumont, "Dame de Conflans Sainte-Honorine", tenía 18 años. Se casó con 'Alice' FitzRoy en 1126, en Montmorency, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. En 1138, su ocupación registrada era constable of france (under louis vii). Murió el 28 de octubre de 1160, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
